DG-LZ-MON.name: dg-lz-mon-dynamic-group
DG-LZ-MON.description: dynamic group for security functions execution, required for Logging Analytics

PCY-MON-SERVICES.name: pcy-mon-services
PCY-MON-SERVICES.description: Policy to allow usage of Observability services in tenancy.
statements: Allow service operations-insights to use ons-topics in tenancy
Allow service operations-insights to read secret-family in tenancy
Allow service loganalytics to use metrics in tenancy
Allow service loganalytics to read loganalytics-features-family in tenancy
Allow service dpd to read secret-family in tenancy

PCY-CENTRALIZED-MON-ADMINISTRATION.name: pcy-centralized-mon-admin
PCY-CENTRALIZED-MON-ADMINISTRATION.description: Policy to allow grp-lz-centralized-mon-admin group users to manage Observability services/resources in tenancy.
statements: allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-admin' to inspect all-resources in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-admin' to read users in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-admin' to read compartments in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-admin' to manage compartments in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-platform:cmp-lz-monitoring
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-admin' to manage dbmgmt-private-endpoints in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-admin' to read dbmgmt-work-requests in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-admin' to manage dbmgmt-family in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-admin' to use database-family in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-admin' to manage metrics in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-admin' to manage ons-topics in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-admin' to manage opsi-family in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-admin' to manage management-dashboard-family in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-admin' to manage management-agents in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-admin' to inspect ons-topics in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-admin' to manage management-agent-install-keys in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-admin' to read instance-family in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-admin' to read instance-agent-plugins in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-admin' to manage loganalytics-features-family in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-admin' to manage loganalytics-ingesttime-rule in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-admin' to manage loganalytics-resources-family in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-admin' to manage management-dashboard in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-admin' to manage management-saved-search in tenancy

PCY-CENTRALIZED-MON-READERS.name: pcy-centralized-mon-readers
PCY-CENTRALIZED-MON-READERS.description: Policy to allow grp-lz-centralized-mon-reader group users to read Observability services/resources in tenancy.
statements: allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-reader' to inspect all-resources in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-reader' to read users in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-reader' to read compartments in tenancy

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-reader' to read ons-topics in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-reader' to read opsi-family in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-reader' to read management-dashboard-family in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-reader' to read management-agents in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-reader' to read management-agent-install-keys in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-reader' to read instance-family in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-reader' to read instance-agent-plugins in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-reader' to read loganalytics-features-family in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-reader' to read loganalytics-ingesttime-rule in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-reader' to read loganalytics-resources-family in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-reader' to read management-dashboard in tenancy
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-reader' to read management-saved-search in tenancy

PCY-MON-DYNAMIC-GROUP.name: pcy-mon-dynamic-group
PCY-MON-DYNAMIC-GROUP.description: Policy to allow the Observability management agent dynamic group to upload metrics and logs.
statements: Allow dynamic-group 'id_lz_common'/'dg-lz-mon-dynamic-group' to use metrics in tenancy
Allow dynamic-group 'id_lz_common'/'dg-lz-mon-dynamic-group' to {LOG_ANALYTICS_LOG_GROUP_UPLOAD_LOGS} in tenancy

PCY-CENTRALIZED-MON-SECURITY-ADMINISTRAT.name: pcy-centralized-mon-security-admin
PCY-CENTRALIZED-MON-SECURITY-ADMINISTRAT.description: Policy to allow grp-lz-centralized-mon-admin group users to manage centralized Observability security resources.
statements: allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-admin' to use vaults in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-security-admin'))

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-admin' to use keys in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-security-admin'))

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-admin' to manage secret-family in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-security-admin'))

PCY-CENTRALIZED-MON-SECURITY-READERS.name: pcy-centralized-mon-security-readers
PCY-CENTRALIZED-MON-SECURITY-READERS.description: Policy to allow grp-lz-centralized-mon-reader group users to read centralized Observability security resources.
statements: allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-reader' to read vaults in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-security-admin'))

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-reader' to read keys in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-security-admin'))

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-reader' to inspect secret-family in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-security-admin'))

PCY-CENTRALIZED-MON-NETWORK-ADMINISTRATI.name: pcy-centralized-mon-network-admin
PCY-CENTRALIZED-MON-NETWORK-ADMINISTRATI.description: Policy to allow grp-lz-centralized-mon-admin group users to manage centralized Observability private endpoint network resources.
statements: allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-admin' to use security-lists in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-network-admin'))

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-admin' to read virtual-network-family in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-network-admin'))

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-admin' to use subnets in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-network-admin'))

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-admin' to use vnics in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-network-admin'))

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-admin' to use network-security-groups in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-network-admin'))

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-admin' to use virtual-network-family in compartment cmp-landingzone where sets-intersect(target.resource.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-role.tag-lz-role, ('lz-network-admin'))
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-admin' to use network-security-groups in compartment cmp-lz-prod:cmp-lz-prod-projects:cmp-lz-prod-proj1
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-centralized-mon-admin' to use network-security-groups in compartment cmp-lz-preprod:cmp-lz-preprod-projects:cmp-lz-preprod-proj1
